description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages register, images, unregister, and multi-arch. Define a .image template that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service, sets RUNNER_ARCH and RUN_AS_PLATFORM from the job name, installs make and bash via apk, runs "make all", belongs to the images stage, is tagged docker and arm64, and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2. Define a .runner template that uses the hashicorp/terraform:0.14.7 image with an empty entrypoint, extracts RUNNER_ARCH and TASK from the job name, cd into ci/aws/$RUNNER_ARCH, runs "terraform init" then "terraform $TASK -auto-approve". Add apply:arm and apply:arm64 jobs extending .runner in the register stage; img:arm and img:arm64 jobs extending .image in the images stage, needing their respective apply jobs, running only on master and publishing an environment named arm/docker_images pointing to Docker Hub; test:arm and test:arm64 jobs extending .image in the images stage, needing their apply jobs, running "make build" and excluded from master; destroy:arm and destroy:arm64 jobs extending .runner in the unregister stage that always run; finally add an arch-tag job using the ulm0/manifest-tool:1.0.0 image in the multi-arch stage, needing img:arm and img:arm64, running only on master and executing "make multi-arch".
